upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aButsyu pra devyA vAcAhamaSvinoH' (f॰8.9.16) prAButsi=ajAgarizam

'aprabudDA paSoH SaktiH prabudDA kOlikasya ca nareSvare jagatsarvaM nimIlati nimIlati… tatpraboDe prabuDyate (hita॰4.135).. (1) prabADate pratanotItyarTaH praSabdo'rTaviparyAsakft na mftyusenAmAyAntI jAtu kaScit prabADate (=vArayati)

'kaTaM na dEvaM Sakyeta pOruzeRa prabADitum' (BA॰saBA॰46.20) prabADitum=pIqayitum virodDum nihantum 'dinakaraBAH prabADamAnaM varzatram' (rA॰2.107.18) dinakaraBA iti dvitIyAbahuvacane rUpam prabADamAnam=nivArayat F.N.
'na sambubuDire cEnaM devAstaM BuvaneSvaram' (BA॰droRa॰202.94) na sambubuDire=na pratyaBijajYuH=na paricikyuH
'laye samboDayeccittaM vikziptaM SamayetpunaH' (yogaBAzye) samboDayet=jAgarayet
'tasya vftrArditasyATa moha AsIcCatakratoH raTantareRa taM tatra vasizWaH samaboDayat' (BA॰SAM॰281.21) prabudDamakarodityAha
'nirvedAdAtmasamboDaH' (BA॰SAM॰295.12).. samboDaH=samyajjYAnam
'virudDamalasamboDAt' (yo॰vA॰6.32.32) samboDaH=prakopaH=AropaH=vfdDiH
'DftarAzwrAtmajeti … samboDya' (=AhUya) (BA॰saBA॰50.35)
'ete samboDayAmastvAM DarmaM ca anupAlaya' (liNgapu0 pU0 6683) samboDayAmaH praboDayAmaH
'viDurAvaboDAH (skandapu0 kA0 43084) viDuro viSlizwaH (nazwa ityarTaH) avaboDo'jYAnaM yEzAM ta iti rAmAnandazwIkAkAraH anyatra durlaBo'yamarTaH
'yaScADarottarAnarTAn vigItAnnAvabuDyate' (manu0 853) avabuDyate=samyag jAnAti
'dEvatamantareRa na Sakyo devatApadArTaH samyagavabodDum' (ni0 71 ityatra durgavacanam) avabodDuM sAkalyenAvagantum
'tatra me kOSalaM sarvamavabudDaM viSAmpate' (BA0 vi0 310)
'tattvAvaboDEkaraso na tarkaH' (vikrama0) ukto'rTaH
'kaccitkAle vibuDyase' (BA0 saBA0 528) vibuDyase jAgarzi
'evaM vyutTApite Darme bahuDA vipraboDite niScayaM nADigacCAmaH saMmUQAH surasattama' (BA0 ASva0 4913).. vipraboDite=boDite=varRite=nirUpite viprAvanarTakO tadarTasya bahuDetyanenEvoktatvAt
'amarAnvE niboDAsmAndamayantyarTamAgatAn' (BA0 vana0 553) niboDa jAnIhi
'udbuDyaDvaM samanasaH saKAyaH' (f0 101011) jAgfta jAgaritA BavatetyAha

'udbuDyasva pratijAgfhi tvam' (vA0 saM0 1554) pratibudDo BavetyarTaH enaM yajamAnaM pratijAgfhIti mahIDara evaM BAzamARaH pratijAgarteH sakarmatvamUrI karoti yujyate cEtat avekzA pratijAgara ityamarokteH pratidinaM yajamAnaM jAgarUkaM sAvaDAnaM kurviti vadanvA'sTAntarRItaRyarTatAM manyata itIha prasaNgAdupanyasyate
'ratyAdyudboDakA loke viBAvAH kAvyanAwyayoH (sA0 da0 229) udboDakA uddIpanAH
'prasuptaH pratibuDyate' (manu0 174) pratibuDyate jAgarti nidrAM jahAti
'prati tvA duhitardiva uzo jIrA aButsmahi' (f0 7813) pratyaButsmahi paSyAmaH tvayi dfSaM prerayAmaH upetA tvamiti jAnImaH
'prati stomEraButsmahi' (f0 4524) stomEstvA tvAM he uzaH pratyaButsmahi
'tadapohitumarhasi priye pratiboDena vizAdamASu me' (raGu0 854)
'strIRAmaSikzitapawutvamamAnuzIzu saMdfSyate kimuta yAH pratiboDavatyaH' (SA 522) pratiboDo budDiraByUhaH
'saMmohaH Kalu vismayanIyo na pratiboDaH' (SA0 6) pratiboDaH smftiH
'pratibudDApi kiM karizyAmi' (SA0 4) pratibudDA jAgaritA
'apratibudDopi cUtaprasavo'tra banDanaBaNgasuraBirBavati' (SA0 6) avikasitaH avijfmBitaH anunmIlitaH avinidritaH
